message:
fix(routes): validate Date/parseInt from query params, fix sendList call

- mail.ts: fix sendList("search_results", results) → sendList(results)
  The search endpoint was passing the string "search_results" as the
  data array argument, returning wrong response shape.

- mail.ts: add NaN guard for messageId URL parameter in read/acknowledge

- cost-analytics.ts: add Invalid Date guards for since/until query params
  and NaN guard for limit param across 7 filter-building blocks

- context.ts: add Invalid Date guard for since param, NaN guard for limit

- history.ts: add Invalid Date guards for startDate/endDate query params

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
